title: Multi-platform build & deploy process — @nextain/naia-agent + @nextain/naia-memory npm publish

gate_approvals.understand: 2026-05-16 — multi-platform build breaks due to file: refs in agent/package.json
gate_approvals.plan: 2026-05-16 — user approved: 2 public packages + offline-first + npm update later

decisions.rationale: naia-agent sub-packages are internal; naia-adk is boilerplate that belongs inside naia-agent

decisions.decision: Offline-first distribution: naia-os ships with both packages pre-bundled as vendor tarballs
decisions.rationale: On-premises environments have no internet; offline-first is correct default

decisions.decision: npm update support added later as Phase B
decisions.rationale: Online update is additive; validate offline path first
Package not yet published to npm (pending OTP); vendor tarball works in all environments

rejected_alternatives.reason: Too granular — internal interfaces have no public value

rejected_alternatives.approach: Reference naia-memory from npm registry in naia-os/agent before publishing
rejected_alternatives.reason: Package not yet published — would break pnpm install immediately

constraints_discovered.constraint: naia-memory had 12 TypeScript errors (types/better-sqlite3 missing, calculateStrength arity, KGEdge.lastStrengthened, etc.) — all fixed
npm publish requires 2FA OTP — user must run: cd projects/naia-memory && npm publish --otp=<code> AND cd projects/naia-agent/packages/naia-agent && npm publish --access public --otp=<code>
node-sources-agent.json for Flatpak offline build requires Linux + flatpak-node-generator Python tool — not generatable on Windows
@naia-adk/skills-builtin has workspace:* dep on @naia-adk/skill-spec — must be resolved via pnpm.overrides in both naia-agent root and naia-os/agent
WorkspaceEscapeError defined independently in both agent-types and agent-runtime — aggregated naia-agent package must explicit re-export to resolve ambiguity

tasks: ✅ add @types/better-sqlite3 devDependency
✅ fix sqlite.ts type errors (calculateStrength arity, KGEdge.coOccurrences, rowToEpisode fields)
✅ fix llm-fact-extractor.ts + test-quick-compare.ts maxEmotion field
✅ fix types.ts epochAnchor missing from semantic.search context
✅ pnpm build clean
✅ pnpm pack → agent/vendor/nextain-naia-memory-0.1.4.tgz
⏳ npm publish @nextain/naia-memory@0.1.4 — BLOCKED: OTP required (user action)
✅ create packages/naia-agent/ aggregated bundle (package.json, src/index.ts, src/skills.ts, tsconfig.json)
✅ vendor tarballs (naia-adk-skill-spec-0.1.0.tgz, naia-adk-skills-builtin-0.0.1.tgz) in naia-agent/vendor/
✅ add pnpm.overrides to naia-agent root package.json for @naia-adk/skill-spec
✅ fix WorkspaceEscapeError export ambiguity in src/index.ts
✅ fix coding-tool.test.ts non-null assertions
✅ pnpm install + tsc -b clean
⏳ npm publish @nextain/naia-agent@0.1.0 — BLOCKED: OTP required (user action)
✅ @naia-adk/skills-builtin → file:./vendor/naia-adk-skills-builtin-0.0.1.tgz
✅ @nextain/naia-memory → file:./vendor/nextain-naia-memory-0.1.4.tgz
✅ pnpm.overrides for @naia-adk/skill-spec
✅ pnpm install (resolved all deps)
✅ tsc --noEmit (0 errors)
✅ pnpm test (1204/1407 pass; 15 failures pre-existing: TTS network, custom skills dir, timeout)
✅ naia-memory + naia-adk vendor tarballs resolve offline within Flatpak sandbox
⏳ node-sources-agent.json — BLOCKED: requires Linux + flatpak-node-generator (Windows environment)
⏳ remove --share=network from manifest — BLOCKED: other npm deps still need network
NOTE: Flatpak build works now with --share=network (existing); full offline only needed for Flathub submission
✅ distribution.yaml updated with npm_packages section + vendor_pattern
⏳ .users/ context mirror update

blockers: npm OTP: user must provide 2FA code to publish @nextain/naia-memory@0.1.4 and @nextain/naia-agent@0.1.0
Flatpak node-sources JSON: requires Linux environment with flatpak-node-generator
surprises: @naia-adk/skills-builtin has workspace:* dep — can't use file: refs without overrides
WorkspaceEscapeError defined in both agent-types (sub-agent.ts) and agent-runtime (path-normalize.ts) — duplicate symbols
